info.title: crank-pr
info.description: Runs benchmarks out of GitHub pull-requests.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: workspace
options.description: The folder used to clone the repository. Defaut is temp folder.

options.name: profiles
options.description: The profiles to run the benchmarks one.

options.name: limit
options.description: The maximum number of commands to execute. 0 for unlimited.

options.name: repository
options.description: The repository for which pull-request comments should be scanned, e.g., https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore, dotnet/aspnetcore

options.name: pull-request
options.description: The Pull Request url or id to benchmark, e.g., https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/pull/39527, 39527

options.name: publish-results
options.description: Publishes the results on the original PR.

options.name: github-base-url
options.description: The GitHub base URL if using GitHub Enterprise, e.g., https://github.local

options.name: arguments
options.description: Any additional arguments to pass through to crank.

options.name: config
options.description: The path to a configuration file.

options.name: age
options.description: The age of the most recent comment to look for in minutes. Default is 60.

options.name: external-log-uri
options.description: Link to the logs (e.g. in AzDO) to publish in the start comment.
